name: AD_Credential_Checker
author: VGA
description: Check if credential is valid for an AD account.

configurationItems.name: LDAP_address
configurationItems.description: LDAP server address with protocol. Example: ldaps://myldap.myorg.com

configurationItems.name: Connection_Method
configurationItems.description: LDAP Connection Method. SIMPLE, SASL or NTLM. Default: SIMPLE

configurationItems.name: Domain
configurationItems.description: Domain used to build the UPN for the LDAP bind. Example: myorg.com
